active_playbooks.title: CPL Cost Spiral — Form, Audience & Creative Triage
diagnosis: If CPM & CTR stable but CPL up = CVR issue (form/audience)
actions: Simplify lead form (2-3 qualifying questions max)
Review targeting: too broad -> irrelevant clicks -> CPL up
Add price or location in creative to deter low-intent leads
Retest audience signal (add Advantage+ signals: city, income)
Refresh creatives with clear value prop ('2 & 3 BHK from ₹99.39L')
If CPL up + quality stable -> improve hook or reallocate to best ads

active_playbooks.title: Thumb Stop Recovery — First 3 Seconds Fix
diagnosis: Check video size/aspect ratio mismatch (cropped on feed?)
Compare thumb-stop by audience and placement
actions: Add motion within first 1 second (pan, zoom, text slide-in)
Use face or eyes (human presence increases scroll-stops)
Add headline overlays on first frame ('3BHK | ₹1.35Cr | Ready 2025')
Use pattern interrupts (camera shakes, cuts, quick zooms)
Test UGC hooks ('POV: You finally find a 3BHK with 3 balconies')
Try native feel (looks like a reel, not an ad)

patterns.detail: Top 2 ads: avg CPL ₹371, CTR 0.65%, CPM ₹66, Freq 1.29
Bottom 2 ads: avg CPL ₹1639, CTR 0.92%, CPM ₹404, Freq 1.19
Bottom performers cost 4.4x more per lead (₹1639 vs ₹371).
'Video' format appears more in bottom performers (1/2) than top (0/2).
Top performers: 50% video, 50% static. Bottom: 50% video, 50% static.
Top video TSR: 0.1% vs bottom: 11.4%. Top video VHR: 47.4% vs bottom: 47.4%. Hook quality not differentiating — check copy/CTA instead.

recommendations.category: CPL Cost Spiral — Form, Audience & Creative Triage
recommendations.detail: CPL ₹1229 > ₹910 alert (target ₹700 × 1.3). 2 possible root causes identified.

root_causes.cause: Form friction / CVR issue (traffic quality OK but not converting)
root_causes.evidence: CTR 0.72% and CPM ₹180 are acceptable but CPL still high
root_causes.solution: Simplify lead form (2-3 MCQs max). Add price in creative to pre-qualify. Check form→CRM latency.

root_causes.evidence: Verify optimization is set to 'Leads', not 'Form Opens' or 'View Content'
root_causes.solution: Check ad set optimization event. Ensure it targets highest-value conversion (lead submission).

recommendations.category: Thumb Stop Recovery — First 3 Seconds Fix
recommendations.action: Fix first 3 seconds on 5 video ads
recommendations.detail: Video ads with TSR < 20%: DM_Static_Your home has b, DM_Influencer - 2, DM_Haripriya_Video_Telugu. Add motion at 0-1s, use face/eyes, headline overlay, pattern interrupts.
